- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Vue 3 + Vite frontend using the Vue flavor of Nuxt UI.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Ran `npm create vite@latest . -- --template vue-ts` and installed dependencies.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Integrated Nuxt UI Vue plugin, TailwindCSS, and a sample landing page experience.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were requested.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Ran `npm run build` (vue-tsc + vite build) successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Added a VS Code task named "npm: dev" that runs `npm run dev`.

- [ ] Launch the Project
	Awaiting user confirmation to launch the dev server.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and these instructions reflect the current setup; HTML comments removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
